name: TeamViewer – TeamViewer main installation configuration including ClientI
categoryDescription: Registry artifacts for 23 Remote Monitoring & Management (RMM) tools documented in the LOLRMM project (lolrmm.io). These tools have legitimate uses but are frequently abused by ransomware operators, APT groups, and tech-support fraud actors for persistent remote access. Each entry maps directly from lolrmm.io/api/rmm_tools.json. Parsed: 65 registry key paths across 23 tools.
description: [TeamViewer] TeamViewer main installation configuration including ClientID, version, and license settings
forensic_value: ClientID uniquely identifies this installation to TeamViewer's infrastructure; Version and License fields identify commercial vs trial/free usage. Unattended access settings visible here.
